sections.title: Arrays
sections.desc: Arrays are used to store multiple values in a single variable.

groups.title: Properties
items: length - Returns the number of elements
constructor - Returns the function that created the Array prototype
prototype - Allows you to add properties and methods

groups.title: Methods
items: at() - Returns element at specified index (supports negative indexing)
concat() - Joins arrays and returns a new array
copyWithin() - Copies array elements within the array
entries() - Returns a key/value pair Array Iteration Object
every() - Checks if every element passes a test
fill() - Fill elements with a static value
filter() - Creates array with elements that pass a test
find() - Returns the first element that passes a test
findIndex() - Returns the index of the first element that passes a test
findLast() - Returns the last element that passes a test
findLastIndex() - Returns the index of the last element that passes a test
flat() - Flattens nested arrays to a specified depth
flatMap() - Maps each element, then flattens result
forEach() - Calls a function for each array element
from() - Creates array from an object
includes() - Checks if array contains a specified element
indexOf() - Returns the first index of a value
isArray() - Checks whether an object is an array
join() - Joins all array elements into a string
keys() - Returns Array Iterator Object with keys
lastIndexOf() - Returns the last position of a specified value
map() - Creates a new array by transforming elements
pop() - Removes the last element and returns it
push() - Adds elements to the end and returns new length
reduce() - Reduces array to a single value (left-to-right)
reduceRight() - Reduces array to a single value (right-to-left)
shift() - Removes the first element and returns it
slice() - Selects part of an array and returns new array
some() - Checks if any element passes a test
splice() - Adds/removes elements from an array
unshift() - Adds elements to the beginning
valueOf() - Returns primitive value of array
values() - Returns Array Iterator Object with values
with() - Returns copy with element at index replaced

sections.title: Strings
sections.desc: Strings are used for storing and manipulating text.

groups.title: Properties
items: length - Returns the length of a string
constructor - Returns the string's constructor function
prototype - Allows you to add properties and methods

groups.title: Methods
items: at() - Returns character at specified index
charAt() - Returns the character at a specified index
charCodeAt() - Returns the Unicode of the character at index
codePointAt() - Returns Unicode value at index
concat() - Joins two or more strings
endsWith() - Checks whether string ends with specified string
fromCharCode() - Converts Unicode values to characters
includes() - Checks whether string contains specified string
indexOf() - Returns position of first found occurrence
isWellFormed() - Checks if string is well-formed Unicode
lastIndexOf() - Returns position of last found occurrence
localeCompare() - Compares two strings in current locale
match() - Searches string for a match against a RegExp
matchAll() - Returns iterator of all matches
padEnd() - Pads string from the end
padStart() - Pads string from the start
repeat() - Returns new string with repeated copies
replaceAll() - Replaces all matches of a pattern
search() - Searches string and returns position
slice() - Extracts part of a string
split() - Splits string into an array
startsWith() - Checks whether string begins with characters
trim() - Removes whitespace from both ends
valueOf() - Returns primitive value of String object

sections.title: Numbers
sections.desc: The Number object is a wrapper for primitive numeric values.

groups.title: Properties
items: EPSILON - Difference between 1 and the smallest value greater than 1
MAX_VALUE - Returns the largest number possible
MIN_VALUE - Returns the smallest number possible
MIN_SAFE_INTEGER - Minimum safe integer minus (2^53 minus 1)
constructor - Returns the function that created the Number prototype
prototype - Allows you to add properties and methods

groups.title: Methods
items: isFinite() - Checks whether value is a finite number
isInteger() - Checks whether value is an integer
isNaN() - Checks whether value is NaN
isSafeInteger() - Checks whether value is a safe integer
parseFloat() - Parses a string and returns a floating-point number
parseInt() - Parses a string and returns an integer
toExponential() - Converts number to exponential notation
toFixed() - Formats number using fixed decimals
toLocaleString() - Converts number to string using locale settings
toPrecision() - Formats number to specified precision
valueOf() - Returns the primitive value of a Number object

sections.title: Math
sections.desc: Math object provides mathematical constants and functions.

groups.title: Methods
items: ceil(x) - Rounds up to nearest integer
exp(x) - Returns e raised to x
expm1(x) - Returns e raised to x minus 1
floor(x) - Rounds down to nearest integer
log1p(x) - Returns natural logarithm of 1 + x
pow(x,y) - Returns x to the power of y
random() - Returns random number between 0 and 1

sections.title: Date
sections.desc: Date object works with dates and times.

groups.title: Constructor
items: new Date() - Creates new Date object

groups.title: Methods
items: getTimezoneOffset() - Returns time difference between UTC and local time
getUTCDate() - Returns day of month in UTC
getUTCDay() - Returns day of week in UTC
parse() - Parses date string and returns timestamp
setUTCDate() - Sets day of month in UTC
toDateString() - Converts date portion to string
toISOString() - Returns date in ISO format
toJSON() - Returns date as JSON string
toLocaleDateString() - Returns date using locale conventions
toLocaleString() - Converts to string using locale conventions
toLocaleTimeString() - Returns time using locale conventions
toTimeString() - Converts time portion to string

sections.title: Objects
sections.desc: Objects are containers for named values.

groups.title: Methods
items: assign() - Copies properties from source to target object
create() - Creates object using existing object as prototype
defineProperties() - Adds or modifies multiple properties
defineProperty() - Adds or modifies a single property
entries() - Returns array of key-value pairs
fromEntries() - Creates object from key-value pairs
getOwnPropertyNames() - Returns array of property names
groupBy() - Groups elements by callback result
isExtensible() - Checks if object is extensible
isFrozen() - Checks if object is frozen
isSealed() - Checks if object is sealed
keys() - Returns array of property names
seal() - Prevents adding or removing properties
values() - Returns array of property values

sections.title: Functions
sections.desc: Functions are code blocks that perform specific tasks.

groups.title: Methods
items: apply() - Calls function with given this value and arguments array
bind() - Creates a new function with a specific this value
call() - Calls function with given this value and arguments
toString() - Returns string representing function source

sections.title: Boolean
sections.desc: Boolean object is a wrapper for boolean values.

groups.title: Constructor
items: Boolean() - Converts a value to boolean
new Boolean() - Creates a Boolean object

sections.title: RegExp (Regular Expressions)
sections.desc: Regular expressions are patterns used to match character combinations.

groups.title: Character Classes
items: [^abc] - Match any character NOT in brackets

groups.title: Quantifiers
items: {n,m} - Match between n and m times

groups.title: Methods
items: exec() - Tests for match and returns result array
test() - Tests for match and returns true/false

sections.title: Sets
sections.desc: Set object stores unique values of any type.

groups.title: Constructor
items: new Set() - Creates a new Set

groups.title: Methods
items: difference() - Returns set of elements in this but not the other
entries() - Returns iterator with [value, value] pairs
forEach() - Calls function for each element
has() - Returns true if element exists
intersection() - Returns set of elements in both sets
isDisjointFrom() - Checks if sets have no common elements
isSubsetOf() - Checks if this set is a subset of another
isSupersetOf() - Checks if this set is a superset of another
symmetricDifference() - Returns elements in either set but not both
union() - Returns set of all elements from both sets

sections.title: Maps
sections.desc: Map object holds key-value pairs.

groups.title: Constructor
items: new Map() - Creates a new Map

groups.title: Methods
items: entries() - Returns iterator with [key, value] pairs
forEach() - Calls function for each element
get() - Returns value for specified key
groupBy() - Groups elements by callback result
has() - Returns true if key exists

sections.title: Promises
sections.desc: Promise object represents the eventual completion or failure of an asynchronous operation.

groups.title: Methods
items: all() - Returns a promise that resolves when all promises resolve
allSettled() - Returns a promise that resolves when all promises settle
any() - Returns a promise that resolves when any promise resolves
finally() - Executes callback when promise is settled
race() - Returns a promise that settles when the first promise settles
try() - Wraps a function in a promise
withResolvers() - Creates promise with exposed resolve/reject

sections.title: JSON
sections.desc: JSON object contains methods for parsing and converting values to JSON.

groups.title: Methods
items: stringify() - Converts a value to a JSON string

sections.title: Error
sections.desc: Error object represents runtime errors.

groups.title: Constructor
items: new Error() - Creates a new Error object

groups.title: Properties
items: cause - Indicates the specific cause of the error

groups.title: Methods
items: isError() - Checks if value is an error

sections.title: Window Object
sections.desc: Window object represents the browser window.

groups.title: Properties
items: closed - Returns boolean indicating if window is closed
defaultStatus - Sets or returns default text in status bar
frameElement - Returns the iframe element the window is embedded in
innerHeight - Returns interior height of window
innerWidth - Returns interior width of window
length - Returns number of iframe elements
localStorage - Allows saving key/value pairs with no expiration
name - Sets or returns window name
opener - Returns reference to window that created this window
outerHeight - Returns outer height including toolbars/scrollbars
outerWidth - Returns outer width including toolbars/scrollbars
screenLeft - Returns distance from left of screen
screenTop - Returns distance from top of screen
screenX - Returns horizontal distance from left of screen
screenY - Returns vertical distance from top of screen
sessionStorage - Allows saving key/value pairs for session
status - Sets or returns text in status bar

groups.title: Methods
items: clearInterval() - Clears interval set with setInterval()
clearTimeout() - Clears timeout set with setTimeout()
moveBy() - Moves window relative to current position
moveTo() - Moves window to specified position
open() - Opens a new browser window
print() - Prints content of current window
prompt() - Displays dialog box prompting for input
resizeBy() - Resizes window by specified pixels
resizeTo() - Resizes window to specified dimensions
scrollBy() - Scrolls document by specified pixels
scrollTo() - Scrolls document to specified coordinates
setInterval() - Calls function repeatedly with delay

sections.title: Console Object
sections.desc: Console object provides access to the browser's debugging console.

groups.title: Methods
items: assert() - Writes an error message if assertion is false
count() - Logs number of times count() has been called
groupCollapsed() - Creates a collapsed message group
table() - Displays data as a table

sections.title: Location Object
sections.desc: Location object contains information about the current URL.

groups.title: Properties
items: hash - Sets or returns the anchor part (#)
host - Sets or returns the hostname and port
hostname - Sets or returns the hostname
href - Sets or returns the entire URL
origin - Returns protocol, hostname, and port
pathname - Sets or returns the path name
port - Sets or returns the port number
protocol - Sets or returns the protocol
search - Sets or returns the query string (?)

groups.title: Methods
items: replace() - Replaces the current document with a new one

sections.title: History Object
sections.desc: History object contains the URLs visited by the user.

groups.title: Properties
items: length - Returns the number of URLs in the history list

groups.title: Methods
items: go() - Loads a specific URL from the history list

sections.title: Navigator Object
sections.desc: Navigator object contains information about the browser.

groups.title: Properties
items: appCodeName - Returns the code name of the browser
appName - Returns the name of the browser
cookieEnabled - Returns true if cookies are enabled
onLine - Returns true if the browser is online
platform - Returns the platform of the browser
product - Returns the browser engine name

groups.title: Methods
items: javaEnabled() - Returns true if Java is enabled
taintEnabled() - Specifies if data tainting is enabled (deprecated)

sections.title: Screen Object
sections.desc: Screen object contains information about the user's screen.

groups.title: Properties
items: colorDepth - Returns bit depth of the color palette

sections.title: Document Object
sections.desc: The document object represents the web page.

groups.title: Properties
items: activeElement - Returns the currently focused element
anchors - Returns a collection of anchor elements with name attribute
baseURI - Returns the absolute base URI
cookie - Returns all name/value pairs of cookies
designMode - Controls whether document is editable
forms - Returns collection of form elements
images - Returns collection of img elements
links - Returns anchor and area elements with href
referrer - Returns URL of referring document
scripts - Returns collection of script elements

groups.title: Methods
items: adoptNode() - Adopts node from another document
getElementById() - Returns element with specified ID
getElementsByClassName() - Returns elements with class name
getElementsByTagName() - Returns elements with tag name
hasFocus() - Returns true if document has focus
importNode() - Imports node from another document

sections.title: Element Object
sections.desc: The element object represents an HTML element.

groups.title: Properties
items: accessKey - Sets or returns accesskey attribute
attributes - Returns a NamedNodeMap of attributes
childElementCount - Returns number of child elements
childNodes - Returns collection of child nodes
children - Returns collection of child elements
classList - Returns class names as DOMTokenList
className - Sets or returns class attribute
clientLeft - Returns width of left border
clientTop - Returns width of top border
contentEditable - Sets or returns whether content is editable
dir - Sets or returns text direction
id - Sets or returns id attribute
innerHTML - Sets or returns content as HTML
innerText - Sets or returns text content
isContentEditable - Returns true if content is editable
lang - Sets or returns language attribute
nextSibling - Returns next node at same level
nextElementSibling - Returns next element at same level
nodeValue - Sets or returns node value
offsetHeight - Returns height incl. padding, border and scrollbar
offsetWidth - Returns width incl. padding, border and scrollbar
offsetLeft - Returns left position relative to offsetParent
offsetTop - Returns top position relative to offsetParent
outerHTML - Sets or returns HTML including element
outerText - Sets or returns text including element
previousSibling - Returns previous node at same level
previousElementSibling - Returns previous element at same level
scrollHeight - Returns entire height including overflow
scrollLeft - Sets or returns horizontal scroll position
scrollTop - Sets or returns vertical scroll position
scrollWidth - Returns entire width including overflow
style - Sets or returns style attribute
tabIndex - Sets or returns tab order
textContent - Sets or returns text including descendants
title - Sets or returns title attribute

groups.title: Methods
items: append() - Inserts nodes at end of element
closest() - Returns closest ancestor matching selector
contains() - Returns true if node is descendant
getBoundingClientRect() - Returns size and position relative to viewport
hasAttribute() - Returns true if attribute exists
hasAttributes() - Returns true if node has attributes
hasChildNodes() - Returns true if node has children
isEqualNode() - Checks if nodes are equal
isSameNode() - Checks if nodes are the same

sections.title: Events
sections.desc: The event object represents an event that occurs in the browser, such as a mouse click, key press, or page load.

groups.title: Properties
items: bubbles - Returns whether the event bubbles up
cancelable - Returns whether the event can be canceled
composed - Returns whether event crosses shadow DOM
currentTarget - Element whose event listeners are triggered
defaultPrevented - Returns true if default action was prevented
eventPhase - Returns current phase (capturing, target, bubbling)
isTrusted - Returns true if event was triggered by user
target - Element that triggered the event
timeStamp - Time when the event was created
type - Returns the event type (e.g., click, keydown)

groups.title: Methods
items: stopPropagation() - Stops event from bubbling up
stopImmediatePropagation() - Stops other listeners from running

groups.title: Common Events
items: click - Fired when an element is clicked
mouseover - Fired when mouse enters element
mouseout - Fired when mouse leaves element
mousedown - Fired when mouse button is pressed
mouseup - Fired when mouse button is released
keydown - Fired when key is pressed
keyup - Fired when key is released
input - Fired when input value changes
change - Fired when input loses focus after change
submit - Fired when a form is submitted
focus - Fired when element gains focus
blur - Fired when element loses focus
load - Fired when page or resource finishes loading
DOMContentLoaded - Fired when HTML is fully loaded
resize - Fired when window is resized
scroll - Fired when document is scrolled

sections.title: Operators
sections.desc: Operators are symbols used to perform operations on values and variables in JavaScript.

groups.title: Conditional (Ternary) Operator
items: condition ? value1 : value2 - Returns value based on condition
